title: KZ-4C record close queue
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL = '\n'
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'KZ-4':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = '08f859bd74bb6a898b34ca1d7794a7251b6c7085'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:13:38Z'
        task['passports_manifest_repaired'] = True
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:15:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS'
queue['next_action'] = 'await operator or Claude to add next tasks; do not invent tasks'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
lines = [
    json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T15:13:38Z','id':'KZ-4','trace_id':'kz4_repair_passports_manifest','sha':'08f859bd74bb6a898b34ca1d7794a7251b6c7085','status':'done','passports_manifest_repaired':True,'workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
]
for line in lines:
    if line not in existing:
        existing += line + NL
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/KZ4C_RECORD_PASSPORTS_MANIFEST_CLOSE_QUEUE.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'KZ-4C','trace_id':'kz4c_record_passports_manifest_close_queue','status':'completed','release_pass':True,'recorded_step':'KZ-4','recorded_sha':'08f859bd74bb6a898b34ca1d7794a7251b6c7085','queue_state':'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'ACTIVE_QUEUE empty; do not invent tasks'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/KZ4C_RECORD_PASSPORTS_MANIFEST_CLOSE_QUEUE.md')
report.write_text('# KZ-4C | Record passports/manifest repair and close queue' + NL + 'Status: completed' + NL + 'Date: 2026-06-04' + NL + NL + 'KZ-4 recorded as DONE with SHA 08f859bd74bb6a898b34ca1d7794a7251b6c7085. ACTIVE_QUEUE has no PENDING tasks. Workflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.' + NL + NL + 'Next: queue empty; do not invent tasks.' + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
